top_signals.title: ‘You sell what you can, not what you want’: Jack Mallers says bitcoin is pricing a global liquidity crisis
top_signals.summary: Strike CEO Jack Mallers says Bitcoin at $63,000 reflects a liquidity-starved world, and questions Strategy's perpetual stock capital dynamic.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Stocks Get AI Boost in Countdown to SpaceX Debut: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders gearing up for SpaceX’s historic debut sent stocks higher ahead of what’s expected to be a major test of investor appetite for artificial intelligence-related companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Draws More Than $100 Billion in Retail Orders
top_signals.summary: Retail investors bidding for shares in SpaceX’s initial public offering have submitted more than $100 billion in orders, according to people familiar with the matter, as the potentially record-breaking debut enters the home stretch.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Barr, Deregulating in a Financial Boom: What Could Go Wrong?
top_signals.summary: Speech At American University, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: Trump administration appeals ruling blocking $100,000 H-1B fee
top_signals.summary: The appeal follows a ruling that President Donald Trump exceeded his authority by imposing a $100,000 H-1B visa application fee without approval from Congress.

top_signals.title: Japan’s parliament advances bill to classify cryptocurrencies as financial instruments
top_signals.summary: The legislation is expected to take effect next year if approved by the upper house, the House of Councillors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
